sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29010" key="duseupo/ristos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσ-ευπόριστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29010.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to procure</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:1:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
